rationale: Current role is Graphic Designer at Initech (fictional company) with entire career at IT services firms (TCS, Infosys) in non-technical operations and project management roles; self-described as 'marketing manager' with zero ML/IR engineering experience.

Career spans Civil Engineer at Dunder Mifflin (fictional company) and Project Manager at a manufacturing firm with a Ph.D in Mechanical Engineering; no ML/AI engineering background or any IR/ranking relevant experience.

Built semantic search infrastructure from scratch (sentence-transformers, FAISS) and shipped a full RAG pipeline (OpenAI embeddings + Pinecone) at product companies Flipkart and Observe.AI, with expert NLP/PyTorch skills and advanced Learning-to-Rank experience spanning 34 months.

Five years split between IT services (Wipro, QA/test automation) and fictional company Pied Piper (frontend dev), with FAISS listed as an intermediate skill but no production ML/IR work and only self-learner-level AI exposure.

Owned the end-to-end e-commerce search ranking layer at Freshworks (evolved BM25 to LTR with a relevance labeling pipeline) and Netflix discovery feed ranking with XGBoost/LightGBM, holding expert Learning-to-Rank and advanced Semantic Search skills plus eval framework ownership.

Project Manager at Infosys executing marketing and demand-generation work (SEO, content marketing, paid acquisition) for 37 months with 3.1 years total experience and zero ML/AI engineering or IR exposure.

Only 1.3 years experience as a .NET developer at HCL (IT services) with IIT Hyderabad education as the sole positive signal; no production ML/IR work, and skill durations for Forecasting and Image Classification (49 months each) far exceed total career length.
Accountant at Wipro (IT services) for 21 months with a marketing manager self-description; no ML/AI engineering or IR experience of any kind despite M.S. Computer Engineering from VIT Vellore.

10.6-year career entirely in non-technical marketing and project management roles at IT services firms (Infosys) and fictional company Wayne Enterprises, with no ML/AI engineering work despite holding an M.E. in Machine Learning from VJTI Mumbai.

Frontend engineer at Hooli (fictional company) with only 1.5 years total experience and self-learner-only AI exposure; Elasticsearch listed as advanced skill with 54-month duration far exceeds the 18-month total career, indicating keyword inflation.
